allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('tag:', d.get\('tag_name'\)\); [print\(a['name'], a['size']\) for a in d.get\('assets',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('unpackedSize:', d.get\('dist',{}\).get\('unpackedSize'\)\); print\('tarball size:', d.get\('dist',{}\).get\('fileCount'\)\)")
